verdict.full_rust_rewrite: technically feasible but not recommended now
verdict.rust_backend_only: possible later if OCR remains a Python sidecar
verdict.partial_rust_adoption: best Rust-shaped option for current project stage

primary_reasons: Local OCR depends directly on Python PaddleOCR/PaddlePaddle.
Desktop delivery and release automation are currently Python-centric.
Schema evolution is split between Alembic and runtime bootstrap logic.
Current validation depth is not yet strong enough to protect a large rewrite.
